  menstrual: [
    "Stay hydrated and drink warm beverages to ease cramps.",
    "Rest when you need to - your body is doing important work.",
    "Try gentle stretching or yoga to relieve tension.",

  follicular: [

    "Increase protein intake to support follicle development.",

  {
    quote: "Your body is your most priceless possession. Take care of it.",
    author: "Jack LaLanne",
  },
  {
    quote: "Self-care is not selfish. You cannot serve from an empty vessel.",
    author: "Eleanor Brown",
  },
  {
    quote: "Rest when you're weary. Refresh and renew yourself.",
    author: "Lailah Gifty Akita",
  },
  {
    quote: "You are enough just as you are. Each emotion you feel, everything in your life, everything you do is enough.",

  },
  {
    quote: "Caring for myself is not self-indulgence, it is self-preservation.",

  },

    quote: "Almost everything will work again if you unplug it for a few minutes, including you.",
    author: "Anne Lamott",
  },
  {

    author: "Lisa Lister",
  },
  {
    quote: "Be gentle with yourself, you're doing the best you can.",
    author: "Unknown",
  },
];

design_guidelines.md.content:
# Jasmin Mobile App - Design Guidelines

## Design Philosophy: "Gentle Glassmorphism"
Jasmin enforces a strict design system optimized for emotional safety and privacy in women's health tracking. The visual language prioritizes organic shapes, soft depth, and dynamic theming that responds to biological cycles.

## Visual Identity

### Typography
- **Font Family**: Inter (Google Fonts) with system-ui fallback
- **Logotype**: 24px, Bold (700), -0.025em tracking, Pink→Purple gradient
- **Hero Greeting**: 30px, Bold (700), -0.025em tracking
- **Section Headers**: 10px, Bold (700), 0.05em tracking (uppercase)
- **Card Titles**: 24px, Bold (700)
- **Body Text**: 14px, Medium (500) main / 12px, Regular (400) secondary
- **Display Numbers**: 48px, Bold (700) for cycle day display
- **Chip Labels**: 10px, Bold (700), 0.025em tracking

### Color System

#### Brand Gradients
- **Primary**: Pink-500 (#EC4899) → Purple-600 (#9333EA)
- **Cycle-Synced Backgrounds** (Dynamic):
  - Menstrual: Pink/Rose gradients (#FDF2F8 base)
  - Follicular: Teal/Emerald gradients (#F0FDFA base)
  - Ovulation: Purple/Indigo gradients (#FAF5FF base)
  - Luteal: Pink→Purple→Teal blend

#### Functional Colors
- **Menstrual**: #EC4899 (Light) / #F472B6 (Dark)
- **Fertile/Follicular**: #0D9488 (Light) / #2DD4BF (Dark)
- **Ovulation**: #9333EA (Light) / #A855F7 (Dark)
- **Warning**: #F59E0B (Light) / #FBBF24 (Dark)
- **Success**: #10B981 (Light) / #34D399 (Dark)
- **Danger**: #EF4444 (Light) / #F87171 (Dark)

#### Night Mode ("Deep Lavender")
- **Base Background**: #1A1025
- **Surface Cards**: #2E2035
- **Active States**: #3D2B4C
- **Primary Text**: #E9D5FF

### Glassmorphism Materials

#### Light Glass
- Background: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)`
- Blur: `backdrop-filter: blur(24px)`
- Border: `1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)`
- Shadow: `0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)`

#### Dark Glass
- Background: `rgba(46, 32, 53, 0.6)`
- Blur: `backdrop-filter: blur(24px)`
- Border: `1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)`

## Geometry & Structure

### Squircle Corners (NO sharp edges)
- **Standard Cards**: 24px border radius
- **Small Elements**: 16px border radius
- **Buttons/Inputs**: 12px border radius
- **Pills/Chips**: Full rounded (9999px)

### The Cycle Wheel
- **Dimensions**: 180px × 180px
- **Track**: 8px stroke, gray-100 color
- **Progress Arc**: 8px stroke, Pink-400 → Purple-500 gradient, rounded linecaps
- **Knob**: 20px diameter (8.5px radius + 3px stroke), white fill, purple stroke, shadow-md
- **Ovulation Marker**: Hollow dot (4px radius, 2px stroke) at Day 14 position

### Calendar Widget
- **Grid**: 7 columns
- **Day Cells**: 40px × 40px circles
- **Phase Layer**: Absolute positioned with 6px padding, 50% opacity
- **Selected State**: 110% scale, high contrast background

### Iconography
- **Source**: Lucide React icons
- **Stroke Width**: 2px standard / 2.5px active
- **Corner Style**: Rounded caps and joins
- **Navigation Icons**: 24px, inactive gray-400, active purple-600
- **Active Icon Container**: Purple-50 background (light) / #3D2B4C (dark), -8px vertical shift

## Component Specifications

### Sticky Header
- **Height**: ~60px (fluid)
- **Material**: 95% white opacity (light) / 95% lavender-950 (dark)
- **Blur**: Medium backdrop blur

### Cards & Containers
- **Daily Insight**: Dynamic phase gradient background, 16px corners, shadow-lg
- **Product List Item**: 16px padding, staggered fade-in animation (75ms delay per item)
- **Hover State**: 2px lift (-translate-y-0.5), scale-[1.01]

### Action Zone (Bottom UI)
- **Surface**: 90% white/lavender opacity with backdrop blur
- **Border**: 1px solid top border (gray-100 light / white/10 dark)
- **Z-Index**: 50 (floats above content)
- **Padding**: Safe area aware

### Inputs & Forms
- **Height**: 52px (16px vertical padding)
- **Background**: Gray-50 light / Night-deep dark
- **Focus Ring**: Pink-300

### Map Markers
- **Shape**: Custom "Glass Drop" SVG pin
- **Fill**: Pink (#EC4899) or Teal (#0D9488) by merchant type
- **Stroke**: White, 2px width
- **Hover**: Scale 1.5 → 2.0

## Animations & Interactions

### Standard Animations
- **Fade In**: Opacity 0→1, 0.5s ease-out
- **Slide Up**: TranslateY 20px→0 + opacity 0→1, 0.4s
- **Pulse Slow**: Opacity 1→0.5→1, 3s (splash icon)

### Interaction States
- **Card Hover**: scale-[1.01] + shadow-md (micro-lift)
- **Button Press**: active:scale-95 (tactile feedback)
- **Tab Navigation**: Active tab scales up with -8px vertical translation

## Authentication & Onboarding

### Splash Screen
- **Background**: Pink-50 → Purple-100 diagonal gradient
- **Logo**: 1.5× scale with 3s pulse animation
- **Duration**: Minimum 2.5s for brand perception

### Auth Modal
- **Backdrop**: Black 40% opacity with slight blur
- **Card**: Top corners 24px rounded only
- **Focus Ring**: Pink-300 on inputs

## Screen-Specific Guidelines

### Dashboard
- **Greeting**: 30px bold with dynamic cycle gradient
- **Cycle Journey Card**: Glass material, 24px corners, phase-appropriate icon container (48px)
- **Status Pills**: Full rounded, bold 10px text, cycle-synced colors

### Marketplace
- **View Toggle**: Map/List switcher in sticky header
- **Cycle Sync**: Auto-highlight products matching current phase
- **Stock Indicators**: Success (in stock) / Warning (low) / Danger (out)

### Profile
- **Avatars**: 56px circles
- **Active State**: 2px pink/purple border + shadow-lg glow
- **Layout**: Horizontal scroll with snap points
- **Settings Cards**: 24px corners, 10px uppercase headers with gray-50 background strip

### Admin Panel
- **User List Items**: 72px height
- **Role Badges**: Admin (pink-500, white text, shadow-lg) / User (gray-100, gray-500 text)
- **Hover**: Subtle white/40 or white/5 background

## Accessibility & Safety
- All touchable areas minimum 44px × 44px
- High contrast ratios maintained in night mode
- Focus states clearly visible on all interactive elements
- Privacy-first: Deep Lavender night mode reduces eye strain vs. pure black
- Confirmation dialogs for destructive actions (role changes, account deletion)

replit.md.content:
# Jasmin - Cycle Tracking & Wellness App

## Overview
Jasmin is a comprehensive cycle tracking and maternal health marketplace mobile app built with Expo React Native. It features a "Gentle Glassmorphism" design system optimized for emotional safety and privacy in women's health tracking.

## Project Architecture

### Technology Stack
- **Framework**: Expo SDK with React Native
- **Navigation**: React Navigation 7 with Bottom Tabs and Native Stack
- **State Management**: React Context API
- **Storage**: AsyncStorage for offline persistence
- **Styling**: Custom design system with glass morphism effects

### Directory Structure
```
/
├── App.tsx                 # Root component with role-based routing
├── context/
│   ├── AuthContext.tsx     # Database-backed auth with role support
│   └── LanguageContext.tsx # Multilingual support (EN/FR/RW)
├── services/
│   ├── api.ts              # HTTP API client for backend
│   ├── storage.ts          # AsyncStorage utilities
│   ├── cycleService.ts     # Cycle tracking logic
│   └── mockData.ts         # Sample product/merchant data
├── navigation/
│   ├── AuthNavigator.tsx   # Login/landing flow
│   ├── MainTabNavigator.tsx # User bottom tab navigation
│   ├── MerchantTabNavigator.tsx # Merchant-specific navigation
│   ├── AdminTabNavigator.tsx # Admin-specific navigation
│   ├── HomeStackNavigator.tsx
│   ├── CycleStackNavigator.tsx
│   ├── ShopStackNavigator.tsx
│   └── ProfileStackNavigator.tsx
├── screens/
│   ├── LandingScreen.tsx   # Welcome/onboarding
│   ├── LoginScreen.tsx     # Authentication
│   ├── HomeScreen.tsx      # Dashboard
│   ├── CycleScreen.tsx     # Cycle tracking
│   ├── JournalScreen.tsx   # Wellness journal
│   ├── ShopScreen.tsx      # Marketplace with onboarding
│   ├── ProductDetailScreen.tsx
│   ├── MerchantDetailScreen.tsx # Merchant products with cart
│   ├── MerchantDiscoveryScreen.tsx # Geospatial merchant finder
│   ├── ProfileScreen.tsx   # User profile
│   ├── SettingsScreen.tsx  # App settings
│   ├── merchant/           # Merchant role screens
│   │   ├── MerchantDashboardScreen.tsx
│   │   ├── MerchantProductsScreen.tsx
│   │   ├── MerchantOrdersScreen.tsx
│   │   ├── MerchantStoresScreen.tsx
│   │   └── MerchantProfileScreen.tsx
│   └── admin/              # Admin role screens
│       ├── AdminDashboardScreen.tsx
│       ├── AdminUsersScreen.tsx
│       ├── AdminMerchantsScreen.tsx
│       ├── AdminAnalyticsScreen.tsx
│       └── AdminSettingsScreen.tsx
├── components/
│   ├── GlassCard.tsx       # Glass morphism card
│   ├── CycleWheel.tsx      # SVG cycle visualization
│   ├── PhaseChip.tsx       # Phase indicator badge
│   ├── InsightCard.tsx     # Daily insight card
│   ├── ProductCard.tsx     # Product list item
│   ├── Button.tsx          # Gradient button
│   ├── CheckoutModal.tsx   # Multi-step checkout flow
│   └── MarketplaceOnboarding.tsx # First-time tutorial
├── constants/
│   └── theme.ts            # Design tokens with phases & maternal colors
└── server/                 # Express.js backend
    ├── index.ts            # API server entry point
    ├── db/
    │   └── schema.sql      # PostgreSQL schema (13 tables)
    └── routes/             # API endpoints
        ├── auth.ts         # Registration, login, profile
        ├── merchants.ts    # Merchant management
        ├── products.ts     # Product CRUD
        ├── orders.ts       # Order management
        ├── stores.ts       # Store locations
        ├── admin.ts        # Admin dashboard & controls
        └── journal.ts      # Wellness journal entries
```

## Key Features

### Cycle Tracking
- Deterministic phase calculation (Menstrual, Follicular, Ovulation, Luteal)
- Interactive SVG cycle wheel visualization
- Calendar view with phase-colored indicators
- Fertility window detection

### Wellness Journal
- Mood tracking with 5 states
- Symptom logging
- Notes and entries history
- Data persistence across sessions

### Marketplace
- Cycle-synced product filtering
- Stock level indicators with color coding
- Cart functionality with quantity management
- Reserve (Teal) and Order (Pink) button differentiation
- Multi-step checkout flow (Address, Payment, Confirmation)
- Payment methods: Cash on Delivery, Mobile Money, Card
- Geospatial merchant discovery with location-based sorting
- First-time marketplace onboarding tutorial

### Admin Dashboard ("God Mode")
- Sidebar navigation with collapsible sections
- Bento grid analytics layout
- User Growth, Active Cycles, Inventory Health widgets
- Merchant management with approval controls
- Inventory alerts showing low-stock items
- AI Insights log tracking LLM usage
- System Health monitoring
- Audit trail logging for all admin actions
- Deep Lavender dark theme for reduced eye strain

### Multi-Role System
- **User Role**: Access to cycle tracking, wellness journal, marketplace shopping
- **Merchant Role**: Dashboard with stats, product management, order fulfillment, store locations
- **Admin Role**: Full platform oversight, user/merchant management, analytics, audit logs
- Role-based navigation automatically routes users to appropriate tab navigator
- JWT-based authentication with online/offline support

### User Management
- Email-based authentication with database persistence
- Three user roles: user, merchant, admin
- Admin access: `admin@jasmin.app`
- Settings for cycle configuration

## Design System

### "Gentle Glassmorphism"
- Frosted glass effects with backdrop blur
- Squircle geometry (rounded corners 16-24px)
- Dynamic cycle-synced gradients
- Deep Lavender night mode (#1A1025)

### Color Palette
- **Brand**: Pink (#EC4899) to Purple (#9333EA) gradient
- **Menstrual**: Pink/Rose tones
- **Follicular**: Teal/Emerald tones
- **Ovulation**: Purple/Indigo tones
- **Luteal**: Pink-Purple blend

### Typography
- Font: Inter (system fallback)
- Logotype: 24px Bold
- Hero: 30px Bold
- Section Headers: 10px Uppercase

## Authentication

### Login Flow
- Email + Name input
- Admin access: `admin@jasmin.app`
- Session persisted in AsyncStorage

### Protected Routes
- MainTabNavigator requires authentication
- Admin panel checks user role

## Development Notes

### Running the App
```bash
npm run dev
```

### Testing Admin Features
Use email `admin@jasmin.app` to access admin panel

### Data Storage Keys
- `@jasmin/user` - User profile
- `@jasmin/cycle_config` - Cycle settings
- `@jasmin/journal_entries` - Journal data
- `@jasmin/wishlist` - Saved products
- `@jasmin/orders` - Order history
- `@jasmin/admin_actions` - Admin audit trail
- `@jasmin/marketplace_onboarding` - Tutorial state

## Recent Changes
- Initial implementation of Jasmin app
- Complete navigation structure with 4 main tabs
- Cycle tracking with wheel visualization
- Wellness journal with mood/symptom tracking
- Marketplace with product filtering
- Profile and settings screens
- Admin panel for user management
- Gentle Glassmorphism design system
- Authentication flow with role-based access
- AdminDashboard with bento grid layout and Deep Lavender theme
- CheckoutModal with multi-step checkout flow
- MarketplaceOnboarding tutorial for first-time users
- MerchantDetailScreen with cart and order functionality
- Order and admin action storage with error handling
- MerchantDiscoveryScreen with geospatial sorting
- **Design System Expansion** (December 2025):
  - Added Maternal/ANC color palette (Teal-600, Emerald-500)
  - Created JasminBrandIcon.tsx (5-petal flower SVG with amber center)
  - Created GradientLogotype.tsx (Pink to Purple gradient text)
  - Enhanced CycleWheel.tsx with 82px radius, gradient arc, pulse knob animation
  - Added PhaseGradients constants for contextual UI styling
  - Enhanced InsightCard with phase-specific gradients and icons
  - Added Quick Log interface for symptom tracking
  - Created MaternalScreen.tsx with Upload Prescription widget and medicine list
  - Added Pharmacy Finder with list/map toggle view
- **Pixel-Accurate Cycle Tracking UI** (December 2025):
  - CycleWheel: Fixed pink-400 to purple-500 gradient, pulse ring with borderWidth animation
  - CycleWheel: Ovulation marker derived from cycleLength/2 (not hardcoded)
  - CycleCalendar: Full calendar month view with 7-column grid, 40x40px day cells
  - CycleCalendar: 4-layer visual system (base text, phase dot 50% opacity, selection scale, data dot)
  - CycleCalendar: Today ring indicator with pink-300 border
  - CycleCalendar: Single ovulation day halo via absolute date calculation
  - InsightCard: Phase-specific gradients with platform-aware blur fallback
  - QuickLog: Semantic day badge (PERIOD DAY vs NORMAL DAY), 72px button width
- **Security & Privacy Features** (December 2025):
  - AppLockScreen: Biometric authentication (Face ID/Touch ID) with PIN fallback
  - DiscreetModeContext: Privacy toggle to hide sensitive cycle information
  - PrivacyVeil: Frosted overlay component that masks data with long-press activation
  - Discreet Mode toggle in Settings > Security section
- **Deep Lavender Theme System** (December 2025):
  - DeepLavender constants: base #1A1025, surface #2E2035, deep #3D2B4C, elevated #4D3A5C
  - Glass material: blur(24), opacity 0.6, border-white/10 inner glow
  - Animations constants: spring (damping 15, stiffness 150, mass 0.3), timing (500ms theme transitions)
  - GlassCard: No shadows in dark mode, uses border-based inner glow styling
  - Storage keys: `@jasmin/app_pin`, `@jasmin/biometric_enabled`, `@jasmin/discreet_mode`
- **Advanced Onboarding & Beta Deployment** (December 2025):
  - OnboardingScreen: 4-slide swipeable carousel with custom SVG illustrations
  - Onboarding slides: Track Your Cycle, AI-Powered Insights, Shop Smarter, Privacy Protected
  - Gesture-based navigation with pan gesture handler and spring animations
  - Progress dots with animated width changes
  - Skip button and back navigation for better UX
  - AuthNavigator: First-time user detection using AsyncStorage flag
  - LoginScreen: Multi-option auth with Google Sign-In button, Apple Sign-In (iOS), and email
  - Social auth buttons with proper styling and loading states
  - Email form with back navigation to social options
  - Terms of Service and Privacy Policy links in login flow
  - Production-ready app.json with proper permissions, bundle IDs, and splash screen config
- **Currency & Localization Updates** (December 2025):
  - Centralized currency formatter: utils/currency.ts with formatRWF function
  - Currency format: "15,000 RWF" (number first, then RWF suffix)
  - USD to RWF conversion at 1:1200 ratio with rounding to whole francs
  - Updated ProductCard, ProductDetailScreen, MerchantDetailScreen, CheckoutModal
  - Delivery fee: 5,000 RWF
- **New User Empty State** (December 2025):
  - CycleScreen displays empty state when user has no cycle configuration
  - Prompts users with "Start Tracking Your Cycle" call-to-action
  - Shows JasminBrandIcon and welcoming message for first-time users
  - cycleService.ts returns hasData: false for uninitialized users
- **JasminBrandIcon Enhancement** (December 2025):
  - Updated to yellow jasmine flower with 5 petals and gradients
  - Orange/amber center dot for realistic flower appearance
  - Optional deep lavender background support
- **New Logo Integration** (December 2025):
  - Updated app logo to new 6-petal pink-purple gradient jasmine flower with golden center
  - Copied new logo to all asset locations: icon.png, splash-icon.png, favicon.png, android-icon-foreground.png
  - Updated JasminBrandIcon.tsx SVG to match new design with:
    - 6 petals with distinct pink-to-purple gradient variations
    - Golden/amber center with highlight effect
    - Matching brand color palette (pink-400 to purple-600)
  - Created BrandedBackground.tsx component with:
    - Subtle logo watermark pattern for screens
    - Light/dark mode gradient support
    - Variant options: default, subtle, prominent
  - HeaderTitle.tsx displays logo in app header with gradient text
